title: OpenClinXR Architecture Bundle v1.4
citation: User-provided OpenClinXR architecture bundle. Accessed locally on 2026-05-02.
permitted_uses: Planning context for architecture, data model, UX, security, validation workflow, MADRs, and deployment assumptions.
Internal design rationale and hypothesis generation.
claims_supported: The prior design direction targets Quest 3 pass-through AR, React/WebXR, Bun/Hono, Cosmos DB, trace logging, validation workflow, and role-based UX.
The architecture package already identifies security, deployment, clinical validation, UX, multi-tenancy, memory efficiency, and critic-review concerns.
